name: chave-mestra-chaveiro
description: PROACTIVELY activate for: 1. User says 'chaveiro', 'assimila esse livro/PDF', 'onde isso se encaixa no sistema'; 2. User wants to absorb a book, article, PDF, or external framework into the Chave Mestra system; 3. User says 'atualiza o skill X', 'modifica o plugin Y', 'refina o sistema'; 4. User says 'o sistema está coerente?', 'verifica os plugins', 'faz auditoria do sistema'; 5. User wants to evolve any SKILL.md with new confirmed patterns or learnings; 6. User says 'chaveiro protocolo 1/2/3/4/5'; 7. Any meta-maintenance or meta-evolution request on the Chave Mestra system itself; 8. User wants to generate a new plugin or integrate a new methodology.
